name: Turret
notes: Generic default defense, buildable at every base. Base for every Turret variant (extends: "turret" — see cold_turret/emp_turret/flame_turret/grenade_tower/river_battery/wind_spire). Note: defensiveStats.range (4) and nonProductionUpgrade.baseStats.range (5) disagree here — the two are meant to describe the same level-1 value (defensiveStats is the static combat profile, nonProductionUpgrade is what actually grows per level) and should match; needs a decision on which number is correct.
